one_line: Interpretability analysis of the 3 synthesized harness rules (harness_synth_v2.json): each rule explained (what/why/failure-mode/worked-example) grounded in rex/harness_synth.py + rex/harness.py, with a runnable validator that reproduces held-out acc 0.897 / 4 false-allows (0 synthesis-quality misses) through the real interpreter; verdict: interpretable by construction.
